attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT                                                                                                                                      
	NCFPT.BK_CAPITAL_FUTURE_PROJ_ID_INT AS BK_CAPITAL_FUTURE_PROJ_ID_INT  , 
	NFD.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE AS BK_DEPARTMENT_CD ,
	NFD.BK_COMPANY_CODE AS BK_COMPANY_CD ,
	NCFFDA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD AS BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD ,
	NCFFDA.BK_CPTL_FUTURE_FIN_DTL_ACCT_CD  AS BK_CPTL_FUTURE_FIN_DTL_ACCT_CD ,
	NCFO.BK_CPTL_FUTURE_ORG_ABBR_NAME AS BK_RSPNSBL_CPTL_FTR_ORG_NAME ,
	NFQ.FISCAL_QUARTER_START_DATE AS BK_PUBLISHED_IN_DT ,
	NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AS BK_PLANNED_FOR_DT,
	CASE WHEN SCRW.PERIOD_ID= -9999   THEN 'SPEND TO DATE ADJUSTMENT'
	      WHEN SCRW.PERIOD_ID= -8888    THEN 'FUTURE SPEND'
	      WHEN SCRW.PERIOD_ID= -7777   THEN 'PLANNED SPEND TO DATE'
	      WHEN SCRW.PERIOD_ID NOT IN (-9999, -8888,-7777) THEN 'FISCAL MONTH' 
	      END AS BK_PLANNED_FOR_PERIOD_TYPE_CD ,  
	'COMMIT' AS   BK_FA_ADDITION_FUTURE_TYPE   ,  
	CAST(COALESCE(SCRW.DV_CMT_NON_OPEX_AMOUNT,0) AS DECIMAL(26,7) )AS RU_FA_ADDTN_ASSET_CMMT_USD_AMT,
	CAST( COALESCE(SCRW.DV_CMT_OPEX_AMOUNT,0) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) RU_FA_ADDTN_OPEX_CMMT_USD_AMT,
	CAST(SCRW.DV_BDGT_NON_OPEX_AMOUNT AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS RU_FA_ADDTN_ASSET_BDGT_USD_AMT,
	CAST(SCRW.DV_BDGT_OPEX_AMOUNT AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS RU_FA_ADDTN_OPEX_BDGT_USD_AMT,
	SCRW.ACTION_CODE,
	'I' AS DML_TYPE 
FROM                                                                                                                                        
	(                                                                                                                                   
	SELECT
		PROJECT_ID,
		ORG_ID,
		COUNTRY_DEPARTMENT,
		CASE WHEN COUNTRY_DEPARTMENT = 'UNK_NOWN' 
				 THEN 'UNK_UNKNOW'
			      ELSE  COUNTRY_DEPARTMENT  END AS DV_COUNTRY_DEPARTMENT,
		PERIOD_ID,
		CASE WHEN PERIOD_ID IN (-9999, -8888,-7777) THEN 190099 
             ELSE PERIOD_ID
             END AS DV_PERIOD_ID,
		PLANNING_ID,
		QUARTER_ID,
		ACCOUNT_ID,
		CASE WHEN ACCOUNT_ID LIKE '6%'THEN AMOUNT * 1000 ELSE 0 END AS DV_CMT_OPEX_AMOUNT,
		CASE WHEN ACCOUNT_ID NOT LIKE '6%'THEN AMOUNT * 1000 ELSE 0 END AS DV_CMT_NON_OPEX_AMOUNT,
		0 AS DV_BDGT_OPEX_AMOUNT,
		0 AS DV_BDGT_NON_OPEX_AMOUNT,
		ACTION_CODE
	FROM 
		$$STGDB.ST_CAP_ROLL_WORK_PLAN_ARC
	WHERE ACCOUNT_ID <> '15040 CIP Activation-offset'
	 	AND  PROJECT_ID IS NOT NULL AND  ORG_ID IS NOT NULL 
AND 	 	
(
PROJECT_ID,
PERIOD_ID,
ACCOUNT_ID,
ORG_ID,
COUNTRY_DEPARTMENT,
QUARTER_ID,
PLANNING_ID
)	IN 
	(
SELECT
STCAP.PROJECT_ID,
STCAP.PERIOD_ID,
STCAP.ACCOUNT_ID,
STCAP.ORG_ID,
STCAP.COUNTRY_DEPARTMENT,
STCAP.QUARTER_ID,
STCAP.PLANNING_ID
FROM $$STGDB.ST_CAP_ROLL_WORK_PLAN_ARC STCAP, $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CAPITAL_FUTURE_PROJECT_TV NCF,$$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_QUARTER NFQ
WHERE STCAP.QUARTER_ID = NFQ.DV_FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME
AND STCAP.PROJECT_ID = NCF.BK_CAPITAL_FUTURE_PROJ_ID_INT
AND NCF.START_TV_DT = NFQ.FISCAL_QUARTER_START_DATE
AND STCAP.Account_id <> '15040 CIP Activation-offset'
AND COALESCE(NCF.PROJECT_ACTIVE_STATUS_CD,'Active') = 'Active'
GROUP BY
STCAP.PROJECT_ID,
STCAP.PERIOD_ID,
STCAP.ACCOUNT_ID,
STCAP.ORG_ID,
STCAP.COUNTRY_DEPARTMENT,
STCAP.QUARTER_ID,
STCAP.PLANNING_ID
HAVING COUNT(1) =1
)	
UNION ALL
 SELECT                 
		EXCRW.PROJECT_ID,
		EXCRW.ORG_ID,
		EXCRW.COUNTRY_DEPARTMENT,
		CASE WHEN EXCRW.COUNTRY_DEPARTMENT = 'UNK_NOWN' 
				 THEN 'UNK_UNKNOW'
			      ELSE  EXCRW.COUNTRY_DEPARTMENT  END AS DV_COUNTRY_DEPARTMENT,
		EXCRW.PERIOD_ID,
        CASE WHEN EXCRW.PERIOD_ID IN (-9999, -8888,-7777) THEN 190099 
             ELSE EXCRW.PERIOD_ID
             END AS DV_PERIOD_ID,
		EXCRW.PLANNING_ID,
		EXCRW.QUARTER_ID,
		EXCRW.ACCOUNT_ID,
		CASE WHEN EXCRW.ACCOUNT_ID LIKE '6%'THEN EXCRW.AMOUNT * 1000 ELSE 0 END AS DV_CMT_OPEX_AMOUNT,
		CASE WHEN EXCRW.ACCOUNT_ID NOT LIKE '6%'THEN EXCRW.AMOUNT * 1000 ELSE 0 END AS DV_CMT_NON_OPEX_AMOUNT,
		0 AS DV_BDGT_OPEX_AMOUNT,
		0 AS DV_BDGT_NON_OPEX_AMOUNT,
		ACTION_CODE
FROM 

 $$EXCEPDB.EX_CAP_ROLL_WORK_PLAN_ARC EXCRW   ,
 $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CAPITAL_FUTURE_PROJECT_TV B,$$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_QUARTER NFQ

WHERE EXCRW.EXCEPTION_TYPE='RI'
AND EXCRW.QUARTER_ID = NFQ.DV_FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME
AND EXCRW.PROJECT_ID = B.BK_CAPITAL_FUTURE_PROJ_ID_INT
AND B.START_TV_DT = NFQ.FISCAL_QUARTER_START_DATE
AND EXCRW.ACCOUNT_ID <> '15040 CIP Activation-offset'
AND COALESCE(B.PROJECT_ACTIVE_STATUS_CD,'Active') = 'Active'

) SCRW                                                                                                                              
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_CAP_ORG_PLANNING_CYCLE SCOPC 
	ON ( SCOPC.PLANNING_ID= SCRW.PLANNING_ID 
         AND SCOPC.ORG_ID = SCRW.ORG_ID 
          AND PLANNING_DATE IS NOT NULL         
	 AND FP_PLANNING_CYCLE_ID LIKE 'COMMIT%' )      
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT NFD
	ON NFD.BK_COMPANY_CODE||'_'||NFD.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE = SCRW.DV_COUNTRY_DEPARTMENT  
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM
	ON (  (NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT*100 + NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT) 	= SCRW.DV_PERIOD_ID )   
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CAPITAL_FUTURE_FIN_DTL_ACCT   NCFFDA   
	ON NCFFDA.SK_ACCOUNT_ID = SCRW.ACCOUNT_ID   
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CAPITAL_FUTURE_ORG  NCFO    
	ON NCFO.SK_ORG_ID = SCRW.ORG_ID  
INNER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_QUARTER NFQ
    ON  SCRW.QUARTER_ID =NFQ.DV_FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME          
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CAPITAL_FUTURE_PROJECT_TV  NCFPT 
      ON ( SCRW.PROJECT_ID = NCFPT.BK_CAPITAL_FUTURE_PROJ_ID_INT
      AND NCFPT.START_TV_DT = NFQ.FISCAL_QUARTER_START_DATE)
                                                                                                                                                         
UNION ALL                                                                                                                                   
                                                                                                                                            
SELECT                                                                                                                                      
	NCFPT.BK_CAPITAL_FUTURE_PROJ_ID_INT AS BK_CAPITAL_FUTURE_PROJ_ID_INT  , 
	NFD.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE AS BK_DEPARTMENT_CD ,
	NFD.BK_COMPANY_CODE AS BK_COMPANY_CD ,
	NCFFDA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD AS BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD ,
	NCFFDA.BK_CPTL_FUTURE_FIN_DTL_ACCT_CD  AS BK_CPTL_FUTURE_FIN_DTL_ACCT_CD ,
	NCFO.BK_CPTL_FUTURE_ORG_ABBR_NAME AS BK_RSPNSBL_CPTL_FTR_ORG_NAME ,
	NFQ.FISCAL_QUARTER_START_DATE AS BK_PUBLISHED_IN_DT ,
	NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AS BK_PLANNED_FOR_DT,
	CASE WHEN SCRW.PERIOD_ID= -9999   THEN 'SPEND TO DATE ADJUSTMENT'
	      WHEN SCRW.PERIOD_ID= -8888    THEN 'FUTURE SPEND'
	      WHEN SCRW.PERIOD_ID= -7777   THEN 'PLANNED SPEND TO DATE'
	      WHEN SCRW.PERIOD_ID NOT IN (-9999, -8888,-7777) THEN 'FISCAL MONTH' 
	      END AS BK_PLANNED_FOR_PERIOD_TYPE_CD ,  
	'BUDGET' AS   BK_FA_ADDITION_FUTURE_TYPE   ,  
	CAST(SCRW.DV_CMT_NON_OPEX_AMOUNT AS DECIMAL(26,7))  AS RU_FA_ADDTN_ASSET_CMMT_USD_AMT,
	CAST(SCRW.DV_CMT_OPEX_AMOUNT AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS RU_FA_ADDTN_OPEX_CMMT_USD_AMT,
	CAST(COALESCE(SCRW.DV_BDGT_NON_OPEX_AMOUNT,0) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS RU_FA_ADDTN_ASSET_BDGT_USD_AMT,
	CAST(COALESCE(SCRW.DV_BDGT_OPEX_AMOUNT,0)  AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS RU_FA_ADDTN_OPEX_BDGT_USD_AMT,
	SCRW.ACTION_CODE,
	'I' AS DML_TYPE
FROM                                                                                                                                        
	(                                                                                                                                   
	SELECT
		PROJECT_ID,
		ORG_ID,
		COUNTRY_DEPARTMENT,
				CASE WHEN COUNTRY_DEPARTMENT = 'UNK_NOWN' 
				 THEN 'UNK_UNKNOW'
			      ELSE  COUNTRY_DEPARTMENT  END AS DV_COUNTRY_DEPARTMENT,
		PERIOD_ID,
        CASE WHEN PERIOD_ID IN (-9999, -8888,-7777) THEN 190099 
             ELSE PERIOD_ID
             END AS DV_PERIOD_ID,
		PLANNING_ID,
		QUARTER_ID,
		ACCOUNT_ID,
		CASE WHEN ACCOUNT_ID LIKE '6%'THEN AMOUNT * 1000  ELSE 0 END AS DV_BDGT_OPEX_AMOUNT,
		CASE WHEN ACCOUNT_ID NOT LIKE '6%'THEN AMOUNT * 1000 ELSE 0 END  AS DV_BDGT_NON_OPEX_AMOUNT,
		0 AS DV_CMT_OPEX_AMOUNT,
		0 AS DV_CMT_NON_OPEX_AMOUNT,

		ACTION_CODE
		FROM 
		$$STGDB.ST_CAP_ROLL_WORK_PLAN_ARC
	WHERE ACCOUNT_ID <> '15040 CIP Activation-offset'
	 	AND  PROJECT_ID IS NOT NULL AND  ORG_ID IS NOT NULL 
AND 	 	
(
PROJECT_ID,
PERIOD_ID,
ACCOUNT_ID,
ORG_ID,
COUNTRY_DEPARTMENT,
QUARTER_ID,
PLANNING_ID
)	IN 
	(
SELECT
STCAP.PROJECT_ID,
STCAP.PERIOD_ID,
STCAP.ACCOUNT_ID,
STCAP.ORG_ID,
STCAP.COUNTRY_DEPARTMENT,
STCAP.QUARTER_ID,
STCAP.PLANNING_ID
FROM $$STGDB.ST_CAP_ROLL_WORK_PLAN_ARC STCAP, $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CAPITAL_FUTURE_PROJECT_TV NCF,$$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_QUARTER NFQ
WHERE STCAP.QUARTER_ID = NFQ.DV_FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME
AND STCAP.PROJECT_ID = NCF.BK_CAPITAL_FUTURE_PROJ_ID_INT
AND NCF.START_TV_DT = NFQ.FISCAL_QUARTER_START_DATE
AND STCAP.Account_id <> '15040 CIP Activation-offset'
AND COALESCE(NCF.PROJECT_ACTIVE_STATUS_CD,'Active') = 'Active'
GROUP BY
STCAP.PROJECT_ID,
STCAP.PERIOD_ID,
STCAP.ACCOUNT_ID,
STCAP.ORG_ID,
STCAP.COUNTRY_DEPARTMENT,
STCAP.QUARTER_ID,
STCAP.PLANNING_ID
HAVING COUNT(1) =1
)
UNION ALL
 SELECT                 
		EXCRW.PROJECT_ID,
		EXCRW.ORG_ID,
		EXCRW.COUNTRY_DEPARTMENT,
		CASE WHEN EXCRW.COUNTRY_DEPARTMENT = 'UNK_NOWN' 
				 THEN 'UNK_UNKNOW'
			      ELSE  EXCRW.COUNTRY_DEPARTMENT  END AS DV_COUNTRY_DEPARTMENT,
		EXCRW.PERIOD_ID,
        CASE WHEN EXCRW.PERIOD_ID IN (-9999, -8888,-7777) THEN 190099 
             ELSE EXCRW.PERIOD_ID
             END AS DV_PERIOD_ID,
		EXCRW.PLANNING_ID,
		EXCRW.QUARTER_ID,
		EXCRW.ACCOUNT_ID,
		CASE WHEN EXCRW.ACCOUNT_ID LIKE '6%'THEN EXCRW.AMOUNT * 1000 ELSE 0 END AS DV_BDGT_OPEX_AMOUNT,
		CASE WHEN EXCRW.ACCOUNT_ID NOT LIKE '6%'THEN EXCRW.AMOUNT * 1000 ELSE 0 END AS DV_BDGT_NON_OPEX_AMOUNT,
		0 AS DV_CMT_OPEX_AMOUNT,
		0 AS DV_CMT_NON_OPEX_AMOUNT,
		ACTION_CODE
FROM 
 $$EXCEPDB.EX_CAP_ROLL_WORK_PLAN_ARC EXCRW   ,
 $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CAPITAL_FUTURE_PROJECT_TV B,$$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_QUARTER NFQ

WHERE EXCRW.EXCEPTION_TYPE='RI'
AND EXCRW.QUARTER_ID = NFQ.DV_FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME
AND EXCRW.PROJECT_ID = B.BK_CAPITAL_FUTURE_PROJ_ID_INT
AND B.START_TV_DT = NFQ.FISCAL_QUARTER_START_DATE
AND EXCRW.ACCOUNT_ID <> '15040 CIP Activation-offset'
AND COALESCE(B.PROJECT_ACTIVE_STATUS_CD,'Active') = 'Active'
	) SCRW                                                                                                                              
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_CAP_ORG_PLANNING_CYCLE SCOPC 
	ON ( SCOPC.PLANNING_ID= SCRW.PLANNING_ID 
         AND SCOPC.ORG_ID = SCRW.ORG_ID 
         AND PLANNING_DATE IS NOT NULL
         AND FP_PLANNING_CYCLE_ID LIKE 'BUDGET%' )      
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT NFD
	ON NFD.BK_COMPANY_CODE||'_'||NFD.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE = SCRW.DV_COUNTRY_DEPARTMENT  
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM
	ON (  (NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT*100 + NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT) 	= SCRW.DV_PERIOD_ID )   
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CAPITAL_FUTURE_FIN_DTL_ACCT   NCFFDA   
	ON NCFFDA.SK_ACCOUNT_ID = SCRW.ACCOUNT_ID   
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CAPITAL_FUTURE_ORG  NCFO    
	ON NCFO.SK_ORG_ID = SCRW.ORG_ID  
INNER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_QUARTER NFQ
    ON  SCRW.QUARTER_ID =NFQ.DV_FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME          
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CAPITAL_FUTURE_PROJECT_TV  NCFPT 
      ON ( SCRW.PROJECT_ID = NCFPT.BK_CAPITAL_FUTURE_PROJ_ID_INT
      AND NCFPT.START_TV_DT = NFQ.FISCAL_QUARTER_START_DATE)

SELECT SCRW.BATCH_ID,
SCRW.PROJECT_ID ,                   
SCRW.AMOUNT  ,                      
SCRW.PERIOD_ID ,                    
SCRW.ACCOUNT_ID,                    
SCRW.ORG_ID    ,                    
SCRW.COUNTRY_DEPARTMENT ,          
SCRW.CIP_FLAG      ,                
SCRW.PERIOD_NAME    ,               
SCRW.QUARTER_ID  ,                  
SCRW.PLANNING_ID   ,                
SCRW.CREATE_DATETIME  ,             
SCRW.ACTION_CODE,
'RI'EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM 
(
	SELECT 
		BATCH_ID,                      
		PROJECT_ID ,                   
		AMOUNT  ,    
		PERIOD_ID,
		(CASE WHEN PERIOD_ID IN (-9999, -8888,-7777) THEN 190099 
					  	  ELSE PERIOD_ID
			             END) AS DV_PERIOD_ID,
		ACCOUNT_ID,                    
		ORG_ID    ,   
		COUNTRY_DEPARTMENT,
		CASE WHEN COUNTRY_DEPARTMENT = 'UNK_NOWN' 
						 THEN 'UNK_UNKNOW'
					      ELSE  COUNTRY_DEPARTMENT  END AS DV_COUNTRY_DEPARTMENT,
		CIP_FLAG CIP_FLAG     ,                
		PERIOD_NAME,
		QUARTER_ID  ,                  
		PLANNING_ID   ,                
		CREATE_DATETIME  ,             
		ACTION_CODE 
 FROM $$STGDB.ST_CAP_ROLL_WORK_PLAN_ARC 
WHERE ACCOUNT_ID <> '15040 CIP Activation-offset'
	 	AND  PROJECT_ID IS NOT NULL AND  ORG_ID IS NOT NULL  AND 
(PROJECT_ID,PERIOD_ID,ACCOUNT_ID,ORG_ID,COUNTRY_DEPARTMENT,QUARTER_ID,PLANNING_ID) IN (
SELECT
STCAP.PROJECT_ID,
STCAP.PERIOD_ID,
STCAP.ACCOUNT_ID,
STCAP.ORG_ID,
STCAP.COUNTRY_DEPARTMENT,
STCAP.QUARTER_ID,
STCAP.PLANNING_ID
FROM $$STGDB.ST_CAP_ROLL_WORK_PLAN_ARC STCAP, $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CAPITAL_FUTURE_PROJECT_TV NCF,$$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_QUARTER NFQ
WHERE STCAP.QUARTER_ID = NFQ.DV_FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME
AND STCAP.PROJECT_ID = NCF.BK_CAPITAL_FUTURE_PROJ_ID_INT
AND NCF.START_TV_DT = NFQ.FISCAL_QUARTER_START_DATE
AND STCAP.Account_id <> '15040 CIP Activation-offset'
AND COALESCE(NCF.PROJECT_ACTIVE_STATUS_CD,'Active') = 'Active'
AND  PROJECT_ID IS NOT NULL AND  ORG_ID IS NOT NULL 
GROUP BY
STCAP.PROJECT_ID,
STCAP.PERIOD_ID,
STCAP.ACCOUNT_ID,
STCAP.ORG_ID,
STCAP.COUNTRY_DEPARTMENT,
STCAP.QUARTER_ID,
STCAP.PLANNING_ID
HAVING COUNT(1) = 1)) SCRW   
	WHERE ( NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_CAP_ORG_PLANNING_CYCLE SCOPC  WHERE
  			SCOPC.PLANNING_ID= SCRW.PLANNING_ID 
         	AND SCOPC.ORG_ID = SCRW.ORG_ID 
         	AND SCOPC.PLANNING_DATE IS NOT NULL)
        OR NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT NFD
               WHERE NFD.BK_COMPANY_CODE||'_'||NFD.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE = SCRW.DV_COUNTRY_DEPARTMENT)
        OR NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM
        	WHERE (  (NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT*100 + NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT)   = SCRW.DV_PERIOD_ID ) )
        OR NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_QUARTER NFQ
			WHERE ( SCRW.QUARTER_ID        = NFQ.DV_FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME))
        OR NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CAPITAL_FUTURE_FIN_DTL_ACCT   NCFFDA   
        	WHERE NCFFDA.SK_ACCOUNT_ID = SCRW.ACCOUNT_ID   )
        OR NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CAPITAL_FUTURE_ORG  NCFO    
        	WHERE NCFO.SK_ORG_ID = SCRW.ORG_ID  )
        OR NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CAPITAL_FUTURE_PROJECT_TV  NCFPT ,$$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_QUARTER NFQA
      		WHERE SCRW.PROJECT_ID = NCFPT.BK_CAPITAL_FUTURE_PROJ_ID_INT
      		AND NCFPT.START_TV_DT = NFQA.FISCAL_QUARTER_START_DATE) )
     UNION ALL
          SELECT BATCH_ID,
        PROJECT_ID ,                   
        AMOUNT  ,   
        PERIOD_ID ,                  
        ACCOUNT_ID,                    
        ORG_ID    , 
        COUNTRY_DEPARTMENT ,
        CIP_FLAG      ,                
        PERIOD_NAME    ,               
        QUARTER_ID  ,                  
        PLANNING_ID ,CREATE_DATETIME,ACTION_CODE  ,'DP' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE               
 FROM $$STGDB.ST_CAP_ROLL_WORK_PLAN_ARC 
WHERE ACCOUNT_ID <> '15040 CIP Activation-offset'
	 	AND  PROJECT_ID IS NOT NULL AND  ORG_ID IS NOT NULL  AND 
(PROJECT_ID,PERIOD_ID,ACCOUNT_ID,ORG_ID,COUNTRY_DEPARTMENT,QUARTER_ID,PLANNING_ID) IN (
SELECT
STCAP.PROJECT_ID,
STCAP.PERIOD_ID,
STCAP.ACCOUNT_ID,
STCAP.ORG_ID,
STCAP.COUNTRY_DEPARTMENT,
STCAP.QUARTER_ID,
STCAP.PLANNING_ID
FROM $$STGDB.ST_CAP_ROLL_WORK_PLAN_ARC STCAP, $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CAPITAL_FUTURE_PROJECT_TV NCF,$$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_QUARTER NFQ
WHERE STCAP.QUARTER_ID = NFQ.DV_FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME
AND STCAP.PROJECT_ID = NCF.BK_CAPITAL_FUTURE_PROJ_ID_INT
AND NCF.START_TV_DT = NFQ.FISCAL_QUARTER_START_DATE
AND STCAP.Account_id <> '15040 CIP Activation-offset'
AND COALESCE(NCF.PROJECT_ACTIVE_STATUS_CD,'Active') = 'Active'
AND  PROJECT_ID IS NOT NULL AND  ORG_ID IS NOT NULL 
GROUP BY
STCAP.PROJECT_ID,
STCAP.PERIOD_ID,
STCAP.ACCOUNT_ID,
STCAP.ORG_ID,
STCAP.COUNTRY_DEPARTMENT,
STCAP.QUARTER_ID,
STCAP.PLANNING_ID
HAVING COUNT(1) > 1)
